_comment: Port of ENUM_Interations, upgraded: each action carries its OWN need/skill gain table (per-tick, applied every activityGainTickSeconds). This fixes the Unreal limitation where all actions on an asset shared the row's gains. Gain values are PLACEHOLDER until verified against CLAUDE.md.

actions.name: Eat a cheese slice
actions._wasteNote: ROADMAP_NEXT item 10 — on stop, either auto-tidied into a nearby non-full garbage can (sim cleanliness personality stat permitting) or dropped as a 'dirty_dishes' transient. See game/garbage.ts.

actions.name: Watch CBC News
actions._note: Signature: TV teaches English. Sim prefers a seat facing the TV.

actions.name: Cook a light meal
actions._durationNote: ROADMAP_NEXT item 5 (§7.11) — first duration-driven action, ships the spec's own worked example. Sim-time seconds (same clock as needsDecayTickSeconds=1/activityGainTickSeconds=2): a novice (cooking skill 0) takes 60s to cook, a master (skill at its max, 10) takes 20s. Also fixes 'cook' never auto-stopping on its own (primaryNeed is null — see accidents.ts's onActionStop doc comment).

actions.name: Use phone
actions._note: PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.20 V2 — opens the Jobs / Visas phone HUD when the sim reaches the phone.

actions.name: Talk to
actions._note: Open decision #4 — what phone Talk to/Play grant

actions.name: Extinguish
actions._note: Accidents slice (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.3) — cleanup action for the 'fire' accident asset's clearedBy. Player-only by design (autonomyEligible false), no need/skill effect.
actions._durationNote: ROADMAP_NEXT B2-5 — base 10s, faster with intelligence (atMin 1 -> atMax 0.5, a smarter sim extinguishes faster), slower when tired (energy atMin 1.6 -> atMax 1, a low-energy sim is slower). Both modifiers multiply onto baseSeconds (no skillVar/atMaxSeconds lerp on this action). See game/duration.ts.

actions.name: Mop up
actions._note: Accidents slice (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.3) — cleanup action for the 'water_puddle' accident asset's clearedBy. Player-only by design (autonomyEligible false); small hygiene gain for the mopping motion.
actions._durationNote: ROADMAP_NEXT B2-5 — base ~6s, slower when tired (same energy modifier as extinguish/clean_up/sweep).

actions.name: Sweep up
actions._note: ROADMAP_NEXT item 6 (fire destruction) — cleanup action for the 'ash' transient asset's clearedBy. Player-only by design (autonomyEligible false), no need/skill effect, same shape as extinguish/mop.
actions._durationNote: ROADMAP_NEXT B2-5 — base ~6s, slower when tired (same energy modifier as extinguish/clean_up/mop).

actions.name: Leave for work
actions._note: ROADMAP_NEXT B3-8 / PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §7.20 V3 — player-only exterior-door work departure. Existing conditions still require vars.job; game/main.ts adds the job-hours code-side gate because each job has different/cross-midnight hours. The short duration lets the stand_use animation visibly complete before the sim disappears; completed-only effects use the ordinary onActionStop path.

actions.name: Go visit
actions._note: ROADMAP_SOCIAL.md S6 — direct clone of leave_for_work's shape: a short duration lets the stand_use animation finish before game/main.ts hides the sim and starts VisitAwayTracker. Ordered ONLY from the Contacts tab's Visit button (game/main.ts's hud.onPhoneContactVisit), never attached to a door asset's interactions list, so it never appears in the ordinary tap menu and needs no vars.job-style condition — visitGate (game/visit.ts) does all the gating before this is ever ordered.

actions.name: Clean up
actions._note: ROADMAP_NEXT item 10 — cleanup action for the 'dirty_dishes' transient's clearedBy (player-taps-it path). game/main.ts refuses to order this action at all (HUD toast) if every garbage can is full/none exist; on completion it deposits into the nearest non-full can (see game/garbage.ts's depositAtNearestCan).
actions._durationNote: ROADMAP_NEXT B2-5 — base ~6s, slower when tired (same energy modifier as extinguish/sweep/mop). Duration completion goes through the same agent.stopAction() path as any other stop, so the existing clearedBy/deposit flow above still fires normally.

actions.name: Empty garbage
actions._note: ROADMAP_NEXT item 10 (item 4: emptying) — shipped on 'door_exterior'. Resets EVERY garbage can's fill to 0 (game/main.ts's onActionStop, action.id === 'empty_garbage' -> garbage.emptyAll()). Ships a short fixed `duration` purely so it auto-completes via the existing §7.11 timer instead of needing new instant-action plumbing — documented simplification, no carrying-garbage-out animation (same precedent as §7.14's exterior door itself).

actions.name: Turn on
actions._note: B6-12 generic power action. main.ts filters it to OFF instances and flips state on arrival; normal use-spot walking remains unchanged.

actions.name: Turn off
actions._note: B6-12 generic power action. main.ts filters it to ON instances and flips state on arrival; normal use-spot walking remains unchanged.
